svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 400 400" width="100%" height="100%"><defs><radialGradient id="cyanGlow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00FFFF" stop-opacity="0.3" /><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00FFFF" stop-opacity="0" /></radialGradient><linearGradient id="cyanStroke" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00FFFF" /><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FFFFFF" /></linearGradient></defs><circle id="inner-glow" cx="200" cy="200" r="150" fill="url(#cyanGlow)" /><g id="rings" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"><circle id="outer-ring" cx="200" cy="200" r="160" stroke="#00FFFF" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="4 12" opacity="0.8" /><circle id="middle-ring" cx="200" cy="200" r="130" stroke="url(#cyanStroke)" stroke-width="4" /><circle id="inner-ring" cx="200" cy="200" r="100" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="50 10" opacity="0.6" /><circle cx="200" cy="40" r="4" fill="#00FFFF" stroke="none" /><circle cx="200" cy="360" r="4" fill="#00FFFF" stroke="none" /><circle cx="40" cy="200" r="4" fill="#00FFFF" stroke="none" /><circle cx="360" cy="200" r="4" fill="#00FFFF" stroke="none" /></g><g id="play-icon"><polygon points="175,150 175,250 260,200" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#00FFFF" stroke-width="4" stroke-linejoin="round" /><polygon points="185,168 185,232 240,200" fill="#00FFFF" opacity="0.2" /></g></svg>
